TaskContractInput.docs: Typed input for the task-contract command family. Check: run the pre-review liveness gate for the given optional TDDD layer and track. Coverage: run the attribution-completeness coverage check for the given track. For both variants, layer/track_id are opaque CLI strings validated into domain types by the primary adapter; the filesystem root is not part of this input (cli_composition injects it at construction time). The coverage check always runs across all layers (no per-layer flag).

TaskContractDriver.docs: Primary adapter for the task-contract command family. Holds private Arc<dyn PreReviewGateService> and Arc<dyn CoverageVerifyService> and dispatches TaskContractInput variants to the appropriate use-case operation. Converts CLI strings to domain value objects (TrackId, LayerId) and renders the outcome as a CommandOutcome (Passed → CommandOutcome::success(None); Blocked → CommandOutcome::failure with the violation list).

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Construct a TaskContractDriver by injecting the check service (PreReviewGateService for liveness) and coverage service (CoverageVerifyService for attribution completeness).

methods.name: handle
methods.docs: Dispatch a TaskContractInput variant to the appropriate use-case operation and render the result as a CommandOutcome. Check validates strings to TrackId/LayerId and calls check_service.check(); Coverage validates track_id to TrackId and calls coverage_service.verify_coverage(). Passed maps to CommandOutcome::success(None); Blocked maps to CommandOutcome::failure with the violation list.
